ksa_text: Skill in integrating and synthesizing data from multiple sources and tools, including data fusion, cross-source correlation, and producing coherent analytical findings from heterogeneous datasets.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-001 (Core Abilities) scores 0.437 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Platform Engineer: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.437 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Core Abilities KSA AB-S-001 as a discrete competency for Data Platform Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Data Platform Engineer market data. General ability without platform engineering-specific grounding. Score 0.437 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. General ability without platform engineering-specific grounding. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: General ability without platform engineering-specific grounding.
